replacements.Create and verify local backup archives: 为 OpenClaw 状态创建并验证本地备份归档
replacements.Write a backup archive for config, crede: 为配置、凭据、会话和工作区写入备份归档
replacements.Print the backup plan without writing th: 打印备份计划但不写入归档
replacements.Back up only the active JSON config file: 仅备份当前活动的 JSON 配置文件
replacements.Exclude workspace directories from the b: 从备份中排除工作区目录
replacements.Create a timestamped backup in the curre: 在当前目录创建带时间戳的备份。
replacements.Write the archive into an existing backu: 将归档写入现有备份目录。
replacements.Preview the archive plan without writing: 预览归档计划但不写入任何文件。
replacements.Create the archive and immediately valid: 创建归档并立即验证其清单与内容布局。
replacements.Back up state/config without agent works: 备份状态和配置，但不包含代理工作区文件。
replacements.Validate a backup archive and its embedd: 验证备份归档及其内嵌清单
replacements.Check that the archive structure and man: 检查归档结构和清单是否完好。
replacements.Emit machine-readable verification outpu: 输出机器可读的验证结果。
